name: The Dragon Upstairs
tagline: A tiny Chinatown jazz club above a bar — 30-person room where you're practically sitting with the band.
talkStory: Perched above J.J. Dolan's pizza pub, this 30-seat room has hosted jazz luminaries passing through Honolulu and launched careers of local musicians since the mid-2000s. The intimate format means you're literally three feet from the saxophone player. It survived only because Chinatown's jazz community rallied to keep it alive. Check their social media for the schedule -- the best sets sell out fast and there's no bad seat in the house.
